scripts.dev: yarn workspace @epic-plan/server dev & yarn workspace @epic-plan/extension dev
scripts.build: yarn workspace @epic-plan/shared build && yarn workspace @epic-plan/server build && yarn workspace @epic-plan/extension build
scripts.package:extension: yarn workspace @epic-plan/shared build && yarn workspace @epic-plan/extension build && rm -f epic-plan-extension.zip && cd extension/dist && zip -r ../../epic-plan-extension.zip .
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @epic-plan/shared typecheck && yarn workspace @epic-plan/server typecheck && yarn workspace @epic-plan/extension typecheck
